questions.question: James says the tongue is a small part of the body but it boasts of what?
questions.feedback: The tongue is small but it boasts of great things.

questions.question: James says wisdom from above is first of all what?
questions.feedback: The wisdom from above is first pure, then peaceable, gentle, and open to reason.

questions.question: James says no human being can tame the tongue.
questions.feedback: No human being can tame the tongue — it is a restless evil full of deadly poison.

questions.question: James compares the tongue to a small _____ that sets a great forest ablaze.
questions.feedback: The tongue is a fire — a small spark that sets a great forest ablaze.

questions.question: Peacemakers who sow in peace reap a harvest of _____.
questions.feedback: Peacemakers who sow in peace reap a harvest of righteousness.
